title: Autonomous Agentic Wealth Management Chatbot Repository
content: Important GitHub project focused on an agentic wealth management chatbot. Purpose: financial risk analysis and adaptive investment planning. Tools: RAG, chain-of-thought prompting, LangChain agents, ChromaDB, GPT-4, Flask, and Microsoft Fabric.

title: Multimodal RAG Food Recommendation Repository
content: Important GitHub project for multimodal food recommendation. Purpose: combine image and text understanding for context-aware suggestions. Tools: AWS Bedrock, FAISS, Titan embeddings, Claude Sonnet, Streamlit, and S3.

title: Conversational EDA Chatbot Repository
content: Important GitHub project for conversational analytics. Purpose: convert natural-language questions into SQL and visual EDA outputs. Tools: GPT-4, LangChain, Streamlit, MySQL, and OpenAI API integrations.

title: Cloud-Native Data Transformation Pipeline Repository
content: Important GitHub data engineering project. Purpose: automate ingestion, transformation, scheduling, and monitoring for analytics workflows. Tools: Snowflake, dbt, Airflow, AWS S3, SNS, EC2, and QuickSight.

title: GitHub Profile
content: Nishanth's GitHub profile showcases AI, analytics, and data engineering projects spanning recruiter-focused chatbot work, RAG systems, dashboards, and production-oriented pipeline implementations.
